meta.task: TASK B - exchange constructibility matrix, shape x side-mix
meta.method: 2026-07-10-one-leg-per-ladder-rule.md probe mechanics: POST /multivariate_event_collections/KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-R (DEMO), construction 200 = ALLOWED; error code recorded otherwise. Tape-evidence first (prod rfq tape, 18.03M rows), probes only for gaps. Docs re-verified 2026-07-11 via docs.kalshi.com create-market page (unchanged: TickerPair{market,event,side yes|no}, 5000 creations/week, 10 tokens/req; leg-validation error vocabulary still undocumented).

probe_stats.log: probe_log.jsonl (this dir): P01-P42, F01-F18, R01-R10, M01-M13, N01-N03
probe_stats.control: P01 constructed + RFQ create/delete round-trip OK; minted demo combo markets are inert (no orders/quotes ever placed)

error_vocabulary.invalid_parameters: metadata gate: is_yes_only violation (pinned by P02), size_max=1 same-event pair, same market twice, event not in collection, non-active market (P37 MLB control)
error_vocabulary.duplicated_legs: same-side (yy or nn) two rungs of one ladder VARIABLE - includes same-series same-game, same-player same-stat, and the golf finish chain ACROSS series (TOUR/TOP5/TOP10/TOP20)
error_vocabulary.conflicting_leg_outcomes: semantic relationship detector - fires per (pair,line,side-mix) with idiosyncratic side-awareness; see validator_model

hard_pair_blocks_all_mixes: BTTS x TOTAL at the implying line (S11: all 4 mixes)
NOGOAL x any same-game zero-implication counterpart (S26-S29)
SPREAD x GAME-TIE / GAME-opponent (S16-S18, S21-S22 incl redundant windows)
side_aware_blocks_impossible_only: 1H-win x totals (S4/S5: yy allowed, yn blocked)
SPREAD x TOTAL same scope (S13: yy allowed, yn blocked)
totals cross-line 1H->FT (S3 M<N: both yy and yn blocked; same-line both allowed)
entity_containments_blocked: UFC DEC x ROUNDS, FIGHT x DRAW (S47/S48)
golf finish chain internal (S50, as duplicated_legs)
holes_still_open: S1/S2/S3-same-line impossible mixes (the 3 surviving 2026-07-07 audit farms)
